learning: 🚀 BLACKROAD AI PHONE OS v2.0 RELEASED! ESP32 now runs a COMPLETE smartphone OS with 9 apps! New: Messages app with chat bubbles & notifications (3 new msgs), Camera app with viewfinder & capture button, App Store with 3 downloadable apps (Voice Assistant Pro, SSH Terminal, Code Editor), Control Center with WiFi/BT/Airplane/DND toggles plus Brightness & Volume sliders. Notification badges on Messages (3) and App Store (5). All with official BlackRoad gradient colors. This is a full iPhone replica on  hardware!
